  as={"h1"}

>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/ledgers/{sequence}/transactions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint represents successful transactions in a given ledger.
